title: Simply More FPS
description: The best minecraft optimization pack! Double the fps, run minecraft on very old pc!
body:
Tired of lag, stuttering, and abysmal frame rates ruining your Minecraft experience?

[Optimization] FPS Boost Pack is scientifically engineered to be the BEST Fabric optimization modpack available today. We have meticulously assembled cutting-edge mods like Sodium, Lithium and many others to completely overhaul the game engine.

Expect to triple your FPS, slash your RAM consumption, and enjoy butter-smooth gameplay, transforming even older machines into high-performance gaming rigs. This pack is designed to maintain a strict Vanilla+ feel while delivering unparalleled speed and stability!

Example of our Fps Boost*
![Example of fps boost (65 vanilla vs 331 our modpack)*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3621a4debff09532e01e8b7cedcde51cd2bdc5a2.png)

Key Features & Unbeatable Advantages
🏆 The Best Performance Engine: Built on the superior Sodium/Iris foundation, this pack delivers the highest FPS gains, crushing the limits of the default game engine. Experience lightning-fast chunk loading and crystal-clear rendering.

🌍 Universal Server Compatibility: Works flawlessly on ANY server! Since all optimizations are client-side, you can jump onto Vanilla servers, Realms, Hypixel, or any other server without needing the pack installed there.

🧠 Superior Game Logic (High TPS): Lithium and Alternate Current ensure the server-side logic runs efficiently. Say goodbye to tick lag and enjoy stable, responsive gameplay, even during intense Redstone activity.

📉 Massive RAM Reduction: FerriteCore is utilized to aggressively optimize memory usage. This means fewer out-of-memory crashes and a lightweight Minecraft, perfect for background use or systems with less RAM.

🖼️ Full Shader Support: Integrated with Iris Shaders, you get the best of both worlds: ultra-high FPS from Sodium and the visual fidelity of your favorite shaders.
✨ Comprehensive Quality of Life: Includes essential client mods like Mod Menu, BetterF3, and WTHIT to make configuration easy and provide crucial in-game information without performance cost.

🚀 Lightning-Fast Startup: Smooth Boot and optimized resource loading ensure you spend less time waiting and more time playing.

This pack cointains shaders from other creator:

Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (by EminGT)

Complementary Shaders - Unbound (by EminGT)

Photon Shaders (by sixthsurge)

RenderPearl (by Luracasmus)

Rethinking Voxels (by gri573)


*performance may vary based on your pc specification and operating system
